results.title: Bengaluru techie earning ₹45 lakh says he feels broke every month: ‘I don’t know where my money is going’
results.description: A Bengaluru software consultant claimed that despite earning ₹45 lakh per annum, he feels broke at the end of the month.

results.title: ‘Automation is reshaping, not shrinking talent’ Q&A with John Dawber, VP, GBS Novo Nordisk
results.description: In a conversation with Sudhir Chowdhary, Dawber explains how the company’s Bengaluru-based global capability hub is harnessing AI, data and digital technologies to transform operations, strengthen the pharmaceutical value chain and drive global innovation. He also highlights India’s expanding role in developing technology-led solutions and creating impact across the organisation. Excerpts:

results.title: Centre targets $100 bn textile exports by 2030, says Union Minister Textiles Giriraj Singh
results.description: Addressing the media in Tirupur after interacting with representatives of the knitwear industry, Singh said Tamil Nadu had been assigned an export target of US$ 21 billion, of which Tiruppur alone is expected to contribute US$ 11.5 billion.

results.title: India, China see top firms lose market dominance in AI lag
results.description: Unlike Taiwan and South Korea, India, China and Hong Kong lack dominant AI champions, leading to lower concentration among their biggest listed companies.

results.title: Speeding hyva truck hits scooter and drags it for nearly 1 Kilometer in Bhuabneswar
results.description: Bhubaneswar: A speeding Hyva truck hit a scooty and dragged it for nearly 1 Kilometer near the Laxmisagar-Jharpada bridge in Bhubaneswar. The scooter driver have sustained seriously injuries in the accident and has been admitted to Capital Hospital. According to sources, the scooter driver was moving under the Jharpada bridge when the hyva truck hit [...] The post Speeding hyva truck hits scooter and drags it for nearly 1 Kilometer in Bhuabneswar appeared first on KalingaTV .
